commandRows.purpose: Validate runtime, profiles, Java/runtime wiring, and env contracts.
List profiles and show masked runtime defaults and resolved routing hints.
Fetch source members/IFS content into the local workspace. Supports --system <name> to select a named profile system at operator request without changing the loaded profile.
Fetch one or more specific source members into a local output directory.
commandRows.example: node cli/zeus.js fetch-member --profile default --lib APPLIB --member ORDERPGM

commandRows.purpose: Analyze RPG/CL/DDS and generate evidence artifacts. Supports --optimize-context, --dense [lite|full|ultra] (rank-aware token reduction + compaction), --prompt-max-tokens, --skip-db2-metadata, --reproducible for large programs and CI stability.
Run preset-guided analyze and bundle flow. Supports --dense (forwarded to analyze steps).
commandRows.example: node cli/zeus.js workflow --preset architecture-review --source ./rpg_sources --program ORDERPGM --out ./output --dense ultra

commandRows.purpose: Run workflow definitions from profile/runtime configuration. --dense [lite|full|ultra] is supported and forwarded to inner analyze steps (rank-aware token reduction & compaction).
commandRows.example: node cli/zeus.js workflow run --profile default --preset onboarding --out ./output --dense full

commandRows.purpose: Package analysis artifacts for sharing and review.
Build reverse-impact analysis by target or field.
Produce a risk-oriented summary for a program.
Generate test plan or test template artifacts.
Generate deployment and change checklist artifacts.
commandRows.example: node cli/zeus.js generate-checklist --program ORDERPGM --type BOTH --impact HIGH --out ./output

commandRows.purpose: Query DB2 table metadata. Supports --json for machine readable output.
commandRows.example: node cli/zeus.js query-table --profile default --table APP_TABLE_00 --schema APPDATA --json

commandRows.purpose: Resolve SQL/system object names and optionally verify required columns.
commandRows.example: node cli/zeus.js resolve-object --profile default --table APP_TABLE_00 --require-column STATUS

commandRows.purpose: Inspect IBM i joblog messages.
Find field/table usage in local sources and or remote members.
commandRows.example: node cli/zeus.js field-search --profile default --field FIELD_ALPHA --table APP_TABLE --source ./rpg_sources --mode all

commandRows.purpose: Search the local source tree by term, member, or table.
Copy fetched source members into the active workspace.
Compare local source members with IBM i members.
Start the optional local artifact viewer and experimental UI shell.
Render QA validations/checks to jira, markdown, or json.
Read object metadata and journaling details.
commandRows.example: node cli/zeus.js inspect-object --profile default --lib APPLIB --name APP_TABLE_00 --type *FILE --journal

commandRows.purpose: Capture before and after test snapshots plus rollback SQL text.
commandRows.example: node cli/zeus.js test-run start --profile default --program ORDERPGM --table APPLIB.APP_TABLE_00 --key ID=1

commandRows.purpose: Execute one or more guarded DML statements with confirmation, backup, and safety preflight options.
commandRows.example: node cli/zeus.js write-sql --profile default --sql "DELETE FROM APPDATA.APP_TABLE_00 WHERE STATUS='X'" --confirm --backup

commandRows.purpose: DML wrapper for INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/MERGE with guardrails.
commandRows.example: node cli/zeus.js upsert --profile default --sql "UPDATE APPDATA.APP_TABLE_00 SET STATUS='X' WHERE ID=1"

commandRows.purpose: Backward-compatible alias for the upsert flow.
commandRows.example: node cli/zeus.js upsert-sql --profile default --sql "INSERT INTO APPDATA.APP_TABLE_00 (ID) VALUES (1)"

commandRows.purpose: Strict insert-only DML command.
commandRows.example: node cli/zeus.js insert --profile default --sql "INSERT INTO APPDATA.APP_TABLE_00 (ID) VALUES (1)"

commandRows.purpose: Strict update-only DML command.
commandRows.example: node cli/zeus.js update --profile default --sql "UPDATE APPDATA.APP_TABLE_00 SET STATUS='Y' WHERE ID=1"

commandRows.purpose: Strict delete-only DML command with the shared write-safety guardrails.
commandRows.example: node cli/zeus.js delete --profile default --sql "DELETE FROM APPDATA.APP_TABLE_00 WHERE STATUS='X'" --confirm --backup

commandRows.purpose: List, register, inspect, and open locally tracked analysis artifacts.
Bridge planning/staging/apply/compile/report flow; never implicit.
Apply structured UI edit operations to local display artifacts.
Regenerate docs/tool-catalog.md (and optional JSON projection) from the CLI command surface; also callable as `zeus docs generate-catalog`.
Start local MCP stdio server for safe read-mostly Zeus tool exposure with allowlist policy gating, guarded write controls, and opaque cursor pagination on supported tools.
Read-only auto-discovery of libraries/source-files/members/tables + resource suggestion.
Command metadata missing; update src/docs/toolCatalogMetadata.js.
Show resolved resource model (Source/Objects/Metadata/Data) per system.

Manage encrypted credentials (Secret Vault). Create key (init-key [--windows] for DPAPI on Windows), encrypt/decrypt values (enc:v1:...) for .env or profiles. Transparent decryption at runtime. Never store plaintext passwords. Supports migrate, check (with --warn-only), status.
commandRows.example: node cli/zeus.js secret init-key --windows && node cli/zeus.js secret encrypt --value "myDbPass"

commandRows.purpose: Command metadata missing; update src/docs/toolCatalogMetadata.js.
usage: sql (alias for query-sql, implies --repl if no --sql/--file)

commandRows.purpose: Command metadata missing; update src/docs/toolCatalogMetadata.js.
Command metadata missing; update src/docs/toolCatalogMetadata.js.

workflowPresets.name: architecture-review
workflowPresets.goal: Run a structure-first analysis and package graph, architecture, and documentation artifacts together.

workflowPresets.name: dependency-risk
workflowPresets.goal: Package defect-oriented prompts and dependency artifacts for risk review and follow-up investigation.

workflowPresets.name: modernization-review
workflowPresets.goal: Bundle modernization prompts, semantic architecture evidence, and change-boundary artifacts.

workflowPresets.name: onboarding
workflowPresets.goal: Produce a concise starter bundle for engineers who need orientation and documentation quickly.

workflowPresets.name: refactoring-review
workflowPresets.goal: Bundle architecture and refactoring prompts with dependency evidence for small-scope change planning.

workflowPresets.name: security-review
workflowPresets.goal: Bundle security-analysis prompt with evidence artifacts for IBM i RPG security risk review.

workflowPresets.name: test-generation-review
workflowPresets.goal: Bundle documentation and test-generation prompts with evidence for scenario and fixture planning.

safetyLevels.typicalAction: Read local files, inspect generated artifacts.
Create or update local artifacts in the workspace only.
Read from IBM i/DB2 without mutations.
Data mutation with explicit user approval only.

rules: Require explicit user approval before any `S3` or `S4` action.
Never execute destructive or production-impacting actions implicitly.
Prefer local preparation plus explicit diff/report output.
Always report exact command lines before execution when risk is non-trivial.
sequence: `fetch` (only if source refresh is needed and approved)
generated artifacts and `bundle` for review/sharing; optional `serve` for local viewing
`bridge` only in operator-gated, explicitly approved flows
